text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: mandree

Log:
  Switch db5/db6 to download from Oracle's https:// sites.

  The http:// sites issue 301-type redirects to https:// so we can spare
  everyone the roundtrip.

  Inspired by...

  Submitted by:	Miyashita Touka
